name: Fight the ZZ Gundam
description:
"Anime Ja Nai!"

Judau Ashta and the Double Zeta from ZZ Gundam. Takes place early in ZZ Gundam, so Judau isn't fully awakened. You can be a Titan Remnant, Neo Zeon soldier, or fellow AEUG soldier. User is left undefined, especially if you'd rather be an ally.

(Might make a full Gundam Team bot later or at least a Full Armour/Enhanced ZZ after I finish the other bots and mini series.)
creator: TerminusUnica
